{"GUID":"558ea6e2-5d31-4f31-a95d-1c4eda2e6c0c","Type":"Text","Text":"8/23/24, 8:59 PM Leo Aesthetics Boutique | Granite Bay Medspa | Botox | Microneedling | Fillers
Home Services Payment Plans About Contact Us Shop
NEUROTOXINS
Reduce the appearance of lines and wrinkles for a smoother look. They are safe, highly effective, and require zero downtime. When carefully injected, Botox, Xeomin and Dysport give skin a smooth and renewed appearance that looks natural.
Treatment only takes 10-15 minutes and a few tiny injections. You can be in and out on your lunch break! Noticeable results should appear 3-5 days after treatment, with full results visible 14 days post-treatment.
Book an Appointment
1/5
https://www.leoaestheticsboutique.com/neurotoxin
8/23/24, 8:59 PM Leo Aesthetics Boutique | Granite Bay Medspa | Botox | Microneedling | Fillers
ABOUT NEUROTOXIN
What it is Neurotoxin is a protein derived from the bacterium Clostridium botulinum. Once reconstituted, the neurotoxin solution is carefully injected into specific muscles of the face to reduce and prevent fine lines and wrinkles.
How it works https://www.leoaestheticsboutique.com/neurotoxin
2/5
8/23/24, 8:59 PM Leo Aesthetics Boutique | Granite Bay Medspa | Botox | Microneedling | Fillers Injected into specific muscles to temporarily relax them by blocking the nerve signals that cause muscle contractions. This results in a reduction in the appearance of wrinkles and lines caused by repetitive facial movements, such as smiling, frowning, or squinting.
What to expect Treatment only takes 10-15 minutes, and a few tiny injections. You can be in and out on your lunch break! Noticeable results should appear 3-5 days after treatment, with full results visible 14 days post treatment.
FAQ
https://www.leoaestheticsboutique.com/neurotoxin 3/5
8/23/24, 8:59 PM Leo Aesthetics Boutique | Granite Bay Medspa | Botox | Microneedling | Fillers How much treatment will I need?
It depends on several factors including: which area(s) you are trying to treat (11s, forehead, crow’s feet, etc), the strength of your facial muscles, and how deep your existing lines are. We recommend a complimentary consultation with our nurse injector to create a plan that is right for you.
Does it hurt?
What’s the downtime?
How long do results last?
Are Botox and Dysport the same?
Are there any side effects?
4/5
https://www.leoaestheticsboutique.com/neurotoxin
8/23/24, 8:59 PM Leo Aesthetics Boutique | Granite Bay Medspa | Botox | Microneedling | Fillers
5/5
